definitions.text: innleder en leddsetning som uttrykker innrømmelse
definitions.translation: introduces a subordinate clause expressing concession
despite the fact that, even though

examples.no: han vant konkurransen selv om han var nybegynner
examples.en: he won the competition even though he was a beginner

examples.no: selv om det ikke var høst, fikk trærne gule blader
examples.en: even though it was not autumn, the trees got yellow leaves
